name: causal-bank-torch-cuda-smoke-scale8
goal: Prove the new Torch causal-bank bridge trains and evaluates on a slop GPU end-to-end.
command: if ! python -c "import sentencepiece" >/dev/null 2>&1; then python -m pip install -q sentencepiece; fi; PYTHONPATH=python python -m chronohorn train train-causal-bank-torch --data-root /snapshot/chronohorn/data/roots/fineweb10B_sp1024 --profile pilot --variant window4 --scale 8.0 --steps 100 --seq-len 128 --batch-size 8 --seed 42 --linear-half-life-max 16 --oscillatory-frac 0.875 --oscillatory-period-min 4 --oscillatory-period-max 64 --static-bank-gate --probe-steps 50,100 --probe-eval-batches 2 --final-eval-batches 4 --device cuda --json /run/causal_bank_torch_cuda_smoke_scale8.json

name: causal-bank-torch-cuda-smoke-scale12
goal: Measure a slightly larger Torch causal-bank bridge on the second slop GPU to validate scaling on CUDA.
command: if ! python -c "import sentencepiece" >/dev/null 2>&1; then python -m pip install -q sentencepiece; fi; PYTHONPATH=python python -m chronohorn train train-causal-bank-torch --data-root /snapshot/chronohorn/data/roots/fineweb10B_sp1024 --profile pilot --variant window4 --scale 12.0 --steps 100 --seq-len 128 --batch-size 8 --seed 42 --linear-half-life-max 16 --oscillatory-frac 0.875 --oscillatory-period-min 4 --oscillatory-period-max 64 --static-bank-gate --probe-steps 50,100 --probe-eval-batches 2 --final-eval-batches 4 --device cuda --json /run/causal_bank_torch_cuda_smoke_scale12.json
